description.content: Check API status and version

variable.description: Get your free API key at csv2geo.com/api-keys

description.content:
## CSV2GEO Geocoding API

The most feature-rich geocoding API available. 18 endpoints covering address geocoding, reverse geocoding, places search, administrative divisions, and autocomplete.

### Quick Start
1. Get your free API key at [csv2geo.com/api-keys](https://csv2geo.com/api-keys)
2. Set the `api_key` variable in this collection
3. Try any endpoint — 1,000 free requests/day

### Key Features
- 461M+ rooftop addresses in 200+ countries
- 72M+ places and points of interest
- 4.6M+ administrative boundaries
- Python SDK: `pip install csv2geo`
- Node.js SDK: `npm install csv2geo-sdk`

### Links
- [Website](https://csv2geo.com)
- [API Documentation](https://csv2geo.com/api/geocoding)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/acenji/csv2geo-api)
- [Blog](https://csv2geo.com/blog)
